info.name: Paragon Users API
info.description:
The Users API allows you to query and modify the state of your Connected Users and their integrations. The API includes REST endpoints for identifying what integrations your user has enabled, disconnecting integrations, disabling workflows, and associating metadata with a Connected User.

Contact Support:
 Name: Paragon

request.description: Returns the authenticated Connected User's details, including their user ID, authentication status, enabled integrations, and associated metadata. Equivalent to the SDK function paragon.getUser().

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing Paragon User Token.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Updates the authenticated Connected User's metadata. You can associate arbitrary key-value metadata with a Connected User. Equivalent to the SDK function paragon.setMetadata().

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing Paragon User Token.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the integration to disconnect.

request.description: Disconnects an integration for the authenticated Connected User. When an integration is disconnected, workflows for that integration will stop running for the user and any saved User Settings will be cleared. Equivalent to the SDK function paragon.uninstallIntegration().

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing Paragon User Token.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Returns the list of integrations available in the project, including their enabled status for the authenticated Connected User.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing Paragon User Token.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the Connect credential to update.

request.description: Updates a specific Connect credential for the authenticated Connected User.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing Paragon User Token.
